title: extract_* chain allocates 3 Vecs per test call
description: extract_match_type, extract_comparator, extract_address_part each return Vec<&Form>. They are chained: each produces a new Vec consumed by the next. Three heap allocations per test invocation on a slice that is typically 3-5 elements. Could use index-based scanning over the original slice instead — expected impact: eliminate 2-3 Vec allocations per test call.
